title: French Fermented Dumplings with Crispy Crumble
description: A twist on traditional French cuisine, these fermented dumplings are topped with a crispy crumble and served with a side of tangy sauce.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Wrap each dumpling with a dumpling wrapper and press the edges together to seal.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add the dumplings and cook until golden brown on the bottom, about 3-4 minutes.
Flip the dumplings and cook for another 3-4 minutes, until golden brown on the other side.
In a separate pan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add the crunchy crumble and cook until golden brown, stirring frequently.
To assemble, place a few dumplings on a plate, top with the crumble, and serve with a side of tangy sauce.
